title: The Fire Within: A Requiem for Katia and Maurice Krafft
original_title: The Fire Within: A Requiem for Katia and Maurice Krafft
overview: Filmmaker Werner Herzog combs through the film archives of volcanologists Katia and Maurice Krafft to create a film that celebrates their legacy.
